title: Chirp to The Orb of Dreamers
description: A simple resource pack replaces the music for the "Chirp" record.
body:
## 🍋‍🟩 **"Chirp"** to **"The Orb of Dreamers"**

### 🫧 A simple **resource pack** for replacing music in a record. 

> This resource replaces the music for the **"Chirp"** record: 
> 
> [Minecraft OST **"Chirp - Minecraft Volume Beta"** by _C418_.](https://youtu.be/cCibTj6drhM?si=Vhsicu1niyId56TR)
> 
> with 
> 
> [Little BIG Planet OST **"The Orb of Dreamers - Little BIG Music"** by _Daniel Pemberton_.](https://youtu.be/YyV7OVihRjQ?si=hWfVpOfmJUaDxMwM)
